profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Mahaka Radio Integra Tbk, through its subsidiaries, engages in the radio broadcasting and digital platform business in Indonesia. The company owns and operates its radio stations under Jack F.M., Gen FM, Gen FM Surabaya, Hot FM, Most FM, KIS FM, Mustang FM, and Jak FM brand names. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.
